title: Logistics Route
notes: Connector between E3, D4, E5, and future F4 Red Supply Corridor.
Red Concord logistics layer with convoy routing, supply authority office, fuel pads, cargo inspection, dispatch room, and blockade staging.
Designed for logistics trucks, custody vans, Civic Patrol cruisers, blockade cars, and Astro Van traversal.
Ground items render below Donny/NPC bodies.
